titleStmt.title: SII 20.238: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 238. (B.K. No. 17 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built into the wall of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Āśvija, s11u. 12, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1547, September 12, Monday.

The inscription states that at the request of Suḍugāḍa Liṅgiseṭṭi, the king exempted the agrahāra Huligere from the levy of marriage tax. Suḍugāḍa Lingiseṭṭi was deputed by the nāḍagauḍas and others of Huligeṟe to request the king for the exemption.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkya
nagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
svasti śrī jayādbudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁga
ḷu 1469 neya plavaṁga saṁvatsarada Āśvija śudha
12 sōmavāra puṁṇyakāladalū śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
sadāśivarāyamahārāyaru vidyānagariya
siṁhyāsanadalū dharmmava pratipālisutirdda kālada
lū śrī huligeṟeya nāḍagauḍa prajega
ḷu seṭṭi paṭṭaṇasyāmigaḷu muṁtāda mahānāḍu
yaru bhaktaru Aṣṭādaśaprajegaḷu huli
geṟeya nāḍa maduveya suṁkava biḍisikoṁḍu
[bā E]ṁdu suḍugāḍa liṁgiseṭṭiyanu paṭṭaṇakke
kaḷisalā sadāśivarāyamahārāyarige
biṁnahaṁ māḍisalāgi svāmi Ā biṁnahavanu

pratipālisi śrī virūpākṣadēvara saṁnidhiya
lū huligeṟeya nāḍa Agrahāra dēva
sthāna puravarga Amaragrāma bhaṁḍāragrāmaga
ḷa heṁṇugaṁḍina maduveya suṁkavanu taṁ
mma pitruru pitāmaha prapitāmaharige puṁṇya
vāgabēkeṁdu dhāradattavāgi maduveya suṁkava
nu caṁdrasūryyaru Uḷḷaṁnabara biṭeU Eṁdu
gujala yiṁmaḍi maṁnappanāyakaranu karasi
huligeṟeya nāḍige maduveya suṁka sarvvamāṁ
nyaveṁdu śilāśāsanavanu barasi hākisi koḍu
Eṁdu nirūpa koḍalāgi mahāprasādaveṁdu
kaikoṁḍu ma ru naṁmma kāryyake kartta
hēḷalāgi
worn out
Digital edition of SII 20.238 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
